mentions.note: Oil services; could get Venezuela infrastructure contracts like it did in Iraq, but multi-year payoff horizon. Valuation already reflects optimism post-open surge.
Cramer's favorite offshore drilling play; higher quality than Transocean.
Oil services stock down 1-2% reflects normalized geopolitical expectations and reduced oil upside. War narrative shifting toward resolution.
Inexpensive; good in weak oil markets, great in strong ones; continue to like it.
